Class EthiopicCalendar

java.lang.Object
org.jscience.social.history.calendars.AlternateCalendar
org.jscience.social.history.calendars.SevenDaysWeek
org.jscience.social.history.calendars.MonthDayYear
org.jscience.social.history.calendars.GregorianCalendar
org.jscience.social.history.calendars.JulianCalendar
org.jscience.social.history.calendars.CopticCalendar
org.jscience.social.history.calendars.EthiopicCalendar
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class EthiopicCalendar extends CopticCalendar
Implementation of the Ethiopian calendar. The Ethiopian calendar is based on the Coptic calendar and is the official calendar of Ethiopia. It has 13 months - 12 of 30 days and one of 5-6 days.

Key features:

  • Epoch: August 29, 8 CE (Julian)
  • 13 months: 12 months of 30 days + Paguemen (5 or 6 days)
  • 7-8 years behind the Gregorian calendar
* @version 2.0
Since:
1.0
Author:
Silvere Martin-Michiellot, Gemini AI (Google DeepMind)
